mapper.select: SELECT id, note_id, tag_id, parsed_tag_name, is_pass, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM biz_note_tag_mapping WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT id, note_id, tag_id, parsed_tag_name, is_pass, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM biz_note_tag_mapping WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT tag_id FROM biz_note_tag_mapping WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND tag_id IS NOT NULL AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO biz_note_tag_mapping (note_id, tag_id, parsed_tag_name, is_pass, is_deleted) VALUES
(#{mapping.noteId}, #{mapping.tagId}, #{mapping.parsedTagName}, #{mapping.isPass}, 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_deleted = 0, tag_id = VALUES(tag_id), is_pass = VALUES(is_pass)
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_note_tag_mapping SET tag_id = #{tagId}, is_pass = #{isPass}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_note_tag_mapping SET tag_id = NULL, is_pass = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE biz_note_tag_mapping SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE note_id IN
#{noteId}

UPDATE biz_note_tag_mapping SET is_pass = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE tag_id IN
#{tagId}
